---
title: "Loan illustrations"
navbar: false
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-navigation: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
.loan-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.loan-panel {
  min-width: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 1000px) {
  .loan-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

:::: {.loan-grid}

::: {.loan-panel}

## Installment loan

{{< include ../materials/_installment_loan.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.loan-panel}

## Annuity loan

{{< include ../materials/_annuity_loan.qmd >}}

:::

::::
